RuleSet.Name: libschema/schema/SchemaSchema.hpp
RuleSet.GenRule: , public virtual $reference RefSchema CPlusNamespace$::I$reference RefSchema SchemaName$Schema

$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaSchemaConstructor each empty empty declSchemaSchemaConstructor )$$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaSchemaConfigurationFileAccessors each empty empty declSchemaSchemaConfigurationFileAccessors )$$declSchemaSchemaAuthorizationAccessors$$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaSchemaJndiNameAccessors each empty empty declSchemaSchemaJndiNameAccessors )$$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaSchemaConnectionMethods each empty empty declSchemaSchemaConnectionMethods )$$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaSchemaNewSchema each empty empty declSchemaSchemaNewSchema )$$iterate SchemaRefs( first declSchemaFileImport each empty empty declSchemaFileImport )$$iterate Id16Generators( each declSchemaSchemaNextIdGen empty empty)$$iterate Id32Generators( each declSchemaSchemaNextIdGen empty empty)$$iterate Id64Generators( each declSchemaSchemaNextIdGen empty empty)$$iterate UuidGenerators( each declSchemaSchemaNextIdGen empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each declSchemaSchemaTableMethods empty empty )$
virtual $CPlusSecNamespace$::$SecSchemaName$Authorization* getAuthorization() const; virtual void setAuthorization( $CPlusSecNamespace$::$SecSchemaName$Authorization* value );
virtual $CPlusNamespace$::I$SchemaName$TablePerms* getTablePerms(); virtual void setTablePerms( $CPlusNamespace$::I$SchemaName$TablePerms* value );
virtual $CPlusDefNamespace$::I$DefSchemaName$$TableName$Table* getTable$TableName$(); virtual void setTable$TableName$( $CPlusDefNamespace$::I$DefSchemaName$$TableName$Table* value );
virtual std::string fileImport( const $CPlusSecNamespace$::$SecSchemaName$Authorization* auth, const std::string& fileName, const std::string& fileContent );
virtual std::string fileImport( const $CPlusSecNamespace$::$popto SchemaDef SecSchemaName$Authorization* auth, const std::string& fileName, const std::string& fileContent );
virtual $poptop SchemaDef CPlusNamespace$::I$poptop SchemaDef SchemaName$Schema* newSchema();
virtual $poptop SchemaDef CPlusNamespace$::I$poptop SchemaDef SchemaName$Schema* newSchema();
virtual const std::string* getJndiName() const; virtual void setJndiName( const std::string& value );
virtual const std::string* getJndiName() const; virtual void setJndiName( const std::string& value );
virtual $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$ConfigurationFile* getConfigurationFile() const; virtual void setConfigurationFile( $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$ConfigurationFile* value );

virtual $popto SchemaDef CPlusDefNamespace$::$popto SchemaDef DefSchemaName$ConfigurationFile* getConfigurationFile() const; virtual void setConfigurationFile( $popto SchemaDef CPlusDefNamespace$::$popto SchemaDef DefSchemaName$ConfigurationFile value );
